results.rendered_html:
udanya 1〉 adj. (von udan) wogend, wässerig: dhārāḥ  ṚV. 2,7,3 .
— 2〉 udanyā f. (von udany) Durst  AK. 2,9,55 .  H. 394 . atha yatraitatpuruṣaḥ pipāsati nāma teja eva tatpītaṃ nayate tadyathā gonāyo 'śvanāyaḥ puruṣanāya ityevaṃ tatteja ācaṣṭa udanyeti (etym. Spielerei)  CHĀND. UP. 6,8,5 .  BHAṬṬ. 3,40 .

results.rendered_html:
udanya a.
1 Thirsty.
2 Watery.
— nyā Thirst; nirvartyatāmudanyāpratīkāraḥ  Ve. 6 ; vyasyannudanyāṃ śiśiraiḥ payobhiḥ  Bk. 3. 40 .
Comp.
— ja a. Ved. born or living in water.
